Racism and staff shortages factors in 'failing' maternity care, report findsThe interim report has identified problems "at every stage" of the maternity journey in England. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c30968817q3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c30968817q3o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 07:55:00 GMT
Cuba says it shot dead four people on US-registered speedboatThe passengers were Cuban nationals living in the US and intended to "carry out an infiltration for terrorist purposes", the Cuban government says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c24drvj8yl2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c24drvj8yl2o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 08:16:40 GMT
'Fear is everywhere': BBC reports from Mexican city turned into war zone by drug cartel feudCuliacán in northern Mexico has seen a surge in violence as rival factions of the Sinaloa cartel battle for control. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2g3vmde0eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2g3vmde0eo#0 Wed, 25 Feb 2026 17:00:49 GMT
Watch: BBC on streets of Mexican city gripped by deadly cartel violenceBBC international correspondent Quentin Sommerville travelled to Culiacán in northern Sinaloa state following an explosion in violence. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cqlgz0xk5zyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cqlgz0xk5zyo#0 Wed, 25 Feb 2026 22:35:14 GMT
UK's first geothermal power plant set to go liveWater super-heated by rocks will also provide the UK's first domestic supply of the critical mineral lithium. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cewzg77k721o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cewzg77k721o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 05:00:07 GMT
This coastal idyll banned 'harmful' holiday lets. Eight years on, has it worked?A ban on new holiday homes sees more permanent residents but some say the policy harms tourism. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy59gznnz0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy59gznnz0zo#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 01:18:20 GMT
There's a solution for e-bike parking chaos - but it's not problem-freeIntroducing dedicated parking bays has not completely solved the issue. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2d1ne15w5go?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2d1ne15w5go#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 00:05:11 GMT

US and Iran to hold talks as pressure for nuclear deal buildsThe indirect negotiations are seen as a last-ditch effort to prevent a conflict, but the chances of a nuclear agreement are unclear. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg1vd95nl9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg1vd95nl9o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 00:09:47 GMT
Ocado to axe 1,000 jobs in cost-cutting driveThe technology and online grocery group is cutting about 5% of its global workforce, with two-thirds of the losses in the UK. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn5gqpz0rk6o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn5gqpz0rk6o#0 Thu, 26 Feb 2026 08:19:17 GMT
